trending_videos.title: STEEL BALL RUN JoJo's Bizarre Adventure 2nd STAGE | Official Trailer | Netflix
trending_videos.description:
STEEL BALL RUN JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure 2nd & 3rd Stage (all 11 episodes) will premiere on Netflix each Friday, starting on September 25.

A desert crossing spanning roughly 750 miles—the land that Johnny Joestar and Gyro Zeppeli must make their way through, is home to the dreaded area known as the “Devil’s Palm.”
As ominous incidents begin to unfold, they are forced to realize that this race is far more than a mere competition.
The two press forward into the 2nd STAGE, where countless hidden motives collide.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/82181513

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

STEEL BALL RUN JoJo's Bizarre Adventure 2nd STAGE | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

trending_videos.title: The Guy She Was Interested In Wasn't a Guy At All | Official Teaser | Crunchyroll
trending_videos.description:
The Guy She Was Interested In Wasn't a Guy At All is coming to Crunchyroll in 2027!

ABOUT THE GUY SHE WAS INTERESTED IN WASN'T A GUY AT ALL
Fashionable and upbeat high schooler Aya loves listening to rock, but no one else seems to share her interest…until she meets a cool, stylish employee at a CD shop. Dressed in black from head to toe, he has this air of mystery about him, and his taste in music is impeccable. Aya falls hard for him—not knowing her crush is actually her female classmate Mitsuki! For her part, Mitsuki generally keeps to herself and avoids standing out at school. But given that she sits right next to Aya, Mitsuki’s all too aware of the other girl’s feelings, and she’s afraid to reveal the truth. So why does she find herself talking with Aya more and more…?

ABOUT CRUNCHYROLL
Crunchyroll is the place to watch all your favorite anime! Stream new anime, full episodes, movies, OVAs, music, openings, endings, trailers and all the best moments in anime, subbed and dubbed!

trending_videos.title: PV 第2弾　アニメ『スティール・ボール・ラン ジョジョの奇妙な冒険』｜2nd Trailer !!　"STEEL BALL RUN JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure"
trending_videos.description:
2nd & 3rd STAGE（全11話）2026年9月25日よりNetflixにて毎週金曜日 世界独占先行配信開始予定！
2nd & 3rd STAGE (11 episodes total)Coming to Netflix from September 25, 2026New episodes streaming every Friday, worldwide exclusively on Netflix!

【INTRODUCTION】 
総距離約750マイルの砂漠越え――
ジョニィ・ジョースターとジャイロ・ツェペリが挑むその砂漠には“悪魔の手のひら”と恐れられる土地が存在した。
さらに、不穏な事件が巻き起こり、このレースがただの競技大会ではないことを思い知らされる。
ふたりは様々な思惑が交錯する2nd STAGEへ立ち向かう。
A desert crossing spanning roughly 750 miles-
the land that Johnny Joestar and Gyro Zeppeli must challenge, is home to the area that is feared as the "Devil's Palm." As ominous incidents begin to unfold, they are forced to realize that this race is far more than a mere competition.
The two press forward into the 2nd STAGE, where countless hidden motives collide.

ジョニィ・ジョースター　cv.坂田将吾 
Johnny Joestar　cv.Shogo Sakata 

ジャイロ・ツェペリ　cv.阿座上洋平
 Gyro Zeppeli　cv.Yohei Azakami 

ディエゴ・ブランドー　cv.石川界人 
Diego Brando　cv.Kaito Ishikawa 

ルーシー・スティール　cv.高橋李依 
Lucy Steel　cv.Rie Takahashi 

スティーブン・スティール　cv.三宅健太
 Steven Steel　cv.Kenta Miyake

videos_without_transcripts.title: The Guy She Was Interested In Wasn't a Guy At All | Official Teaser | Crunchyroll
videos_without_transcripts.description:
The Guy She Was Interested In Wasn't a Guy At All is coming to Crunchyroll in 2027!

ABOUT THE GUY SHE WAS INTERESTED IN WASN'T A GUY AT ALL
Fashionable and upbeat high schooler Aya loves listening to rock, but no one else seems to share her interest…until she meets a cool, stylish employee at a CD shop. Dressed in black from head to toe, he has this air of mystery about him, and his taste in music is impeccable. Aya falls hard for him—not knowing her crush is actually her female classmate Mitsuki! For her part, Mitsuki generally keeps to herself and avoids standing out at school. But given that she sits right next to Aya, Mitsuki’s all too aware of the other girl’s feelings, and she’s afraid to reveal the truth. So why does she find herself talking with Aya more and more…?

ABOUT CRUNCHYROLL
Crunchyroll is the place to watch all your favorite anime! Stream new anime, full episodes, movies, OVAs, music, openings, endings, trailers and all the best moments in anime, subbed and dubbed!

movie_and_series_trailers.description: Videos related to upcoming movie and series releases, such as 'The Hunger Games: Sunrise on the Reaping' and 'STEEL BALL RUN JoJo's Bizarre Adventure', are trending, indicating high interest in popular franchises and adaptations.
movie_and_series_trailers.recommendation: Content creators should consider producing related content such as reviews, theories, or behind-the-scenes analysis to leverage the interest in these popular franchises.

anime_and_japanese_content.description: Videos related to anime, such as 'STEEL BALL RUN JoJo's Bizarre Adventure' and 'The Guy She Was Interested In Wasn't a Guy At All', show a strong presence, highlighting the continuing global engagement with anime content.
anime_and_japanese_content.recommendation: Channels could expand into anime-related content, including reviews, discussions, and fan theories, to capture the anime audience.

interactive_and_challenge_content.description: Interactive content such as '10 YouTubers vs 2 Secret Traitors' indicates a trend toward engaging, participatory videos that involve audiences in games or challenges.
interactive_and_challenge_content.recommendation: Creators should explore interactive content formats, possibly integrating audience participation through comments, polls, or live-streaming events.

diverse_content.description: Top channels like MrBeast Gaming and VanossGaming, known for diverse and engaging content, suggest a trend towards varied video formats that maintain high viewer interest.
diverse_content.recommendation: Emerging creators should diversify their content offerings to include a mix of gaming, challenges, and collaborations to attract and retain a wider audience.

brand_collaborations.description: Collaboration with well-known franchises and platforms such as Netflix and Crunchyroll shows effectiveness in reaching large audiences.
brand_collaborations.recommendation: Creators should pursue collaborations with popular brands and franchises to boost visibility and tap into established fanbases.

emerging_franchises.description: Upcoming releases like 'The Hunger Games: Sunrise on the Reaping (2026)' present a prime opportunity for creators to produce anticipatory content leading up to the release.
emerging_franchises.recommendation: Creators can capitalize by producing speculative content, trailers analysis, and fan theory videos to capture audience interest before the official release.

localization_and_subtitled_content.description: The presence of Japanese-titled videos suggests a potential market for localized or subtitled content for non-English-speaking audiences.
localization_and_subtitled_content.recommendation: Channels should consider offering multilingual content or subtitles to broaden their audience reach, particularly in regions with high anime consumption.
